requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-ui (xsRMrju3D1, draft) — FR-UI1..30 + NFR-UI1..10; Architecture: orvex-studio-ui (DmJsnB5Z9Y, canonical) — A-SHELL/A-STREAM/A-DRAFT/A-DS/A-STATELESS/A-GLOBAL/A-AUTH rulings

epics.title: [EPIC] ui: Foundation, tooling & shared rendering substrate

stories.title: [ui] CI ship-gate harness: vitest + Playwright + eslint + axe + visual + token-lint + cell-lint enrolment
[ui] Contracts codegen consumer + typed BFF `/api` client + identity session-token attach
[ui] orvex-ds.css exact-match token pipeline + theme-before-first-paint + dual-theme/dual-skin scaffold
[ui] Shared draft-vs-committed proposal-rendering layer
[ui] Honest-states primitives: skeleton/empty/error trio, '—' loading, Tier-1 Copy, soft-fail
[ui] Entitlement rendering + single SSE entitlement channel + over-quota 402 state
[ui] Serving topology & deploy: Workers Static Assets, grey-cloud origins, region-agnostic bundle, runtime CONFIG
[ui] orvex-ds design system — ownership + shipping home (PO must-resolve: fold into orvex-studio-ui vs separate component)

epics.title: [EPIC] ui: App shell, routing & first-run state machine

stories.title: [ui] Signed-in shell: sidebar (6 destinations), Create CTA, account footer, ⌘K palette, inbox drawer, responsive breakpoints
[ui] First-run state machine ANON/NEW-AUTH/RETURNING + Task Box two-mode in-place morph
[ui] Front door + routing map + client session redirect + deep-link restore
[ui] Dashboard zones (RETURNING/NEW-AUTH, honest-empty, live-fill on transition)
[ui] Streaming FormSpec onboarding (SSE) + byte-identical deterministic fallback
[ui] Form→Home morph choreography + reduced-motion instant swap
[ui] Memory wall + full FR-31 provenance (private, no reputation)
[ui] Sensitive-field consent UX + Enrichment Policy setting + hard-delete
[ui] Memory Coach gating render + scale (1k/10k) + Professional Mode skin
[ui] FR-O3 designed empty states on every memory surface (teach the next action) + demo/real separation
[ui] Marketplace home + search-as-you-type + facets + anon wall-free variant
[ui] Skill Viewer: typed items, per-block provenance, injection slots, raw fallback
[ui] Builder Base+Delta: fork/edit, immutability, toggle, autosave, <50ms weave, concurrency
[ui] Improve panel: five result states + non-optimistic apply + cached-exemplar fallback
[ui] Capture-back seam (Save to Memory after Apply, consent-gated)
[ui] Five-AI export + Tier-1 clipboard-blocked fallback
[ui] Share permalinks + prompt-via-us launch + Enrich-this-prompt tick
[ui] Library & Collections (Delta-intact reopen, bulk export, cross-device)

epics.title: [EPIC] ui: Phase-2 curation surfaces (Demo World, Import, Chat History, Curator)

stories.title: [ui] Demo World: banner, guided first-run, demo-mode citations, atomic graduation
[ui] Chat-History Import wizard (per-provider, content-managed instructions, resumable upload, time window)
[ui] Chat History surface (browse, instant search, faithful conversation render, retention controls)
[ui] Curator desk + Curation Queue (grouped, per-group approve, provenance, diff previews)
[ui] Task-first wizard — the interview surface (say the task → guided Q&A → marketplace scan → compose)
[ui] Your Wiki: omnibox (search+Ask), native read pane, hover cards, wiki activity
[ui] Connections & MCP setup (one-time secret, write-mode switch, guided setup)
[ui] Pricing, billing, trial & upgrade moments (GBP-only, Checkout/Portal redirect, dunning truth)
[ui] AI-privacy setup — verify the connected assistant won't train on your data (connections surface, honest unsupported states)
[ui] Accessibility ship-gate: WCAG 2.1 AA both themes + both skins (axe + contrast + reduced-motion)
[ui] Performance, scale, streaming-resilience & offline posture
[ui] Security, BFF-only egress hardening & observability
[ui] Product-metric instrumentation (SM funnel to BFF ingest, first-party only)
[ui] NFR-7 i18n readiness — memory surfaces i18n-capable, English-first, EU-beachhead locale phasing
